body_txt: In fiction, often a female character will have a deep or raspy voice to emphasize that she is One of the Boys or The Lad-ette . This is more common with child/preteen characters than adults, but appears in all age brackets (and sizes). Compare Action Girl , which is often a tomboy in her own right. Contrast with Effeminate Voice , which is a feminine male character with a high-pitched voice.
